title: Crunchy German Rye Bread Sandwich
description: An earthy and crunchy brunch-mood dish featuring star anise for a unique twist on traditional rye bread.

ingredients.name: Rye Bread
ingredients.notes: Select whole grain or multigrain bread

ingredients.name: Star Anise
ingredients.notes: Optional, for added flavor and aroma

ingredients.name: All-Purpose Flour
ingredients.notes: To be mixed with star anise if using

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.notes: For activating the star anise mixture

ingredients.name: Nut-Free Spread
ingredients.notes: Such as Nutella or a similar spread

instructions: Mix all-purpose flour and star anise in a small bowl. Add water until you get a thin paste.
Spread the mixture evenly on one slice of bread, pressing gently for even coverage.
Top with another slice of bread, spread side down.
Bake in preheated oven for 5-7 minutes or until golden brown and slightly crispy.
Remove from oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
Serve alongside your favorite nut-free spread as desired.
